name: Manufacturing
description: Models for discrete and process manufacturing, assembly lines, job shops, paint shops, and related production operations.

name: Home Appliances
description: Manufacturing of major home appliances including refrigerators, washing machines, dryers, dishwashers, ranges, ovens, and air conditioners. Non-canonical sub-domain refinement of Manufacturing.

name: Production Engineering
description: Cross-cutting engineering discipline covering process design, line balancing, shop floor optimization, and manufacturing capacity planning. Non-canonical cross-cutting theme.

name: Assembly Line Balancing
description: Narrow topical theme specifically about balancing work across assembly stations to minimize cycle time. Non-canonical narrow theme that could be considered for consolidation with Production Engineering.
